title: Design system — component library + theme tokens
description: Port The Lab dark theme to CSS-in-JS tokens. Build core components: Card, Table, Badge, Modal, Tab, TeamSelector, PlayerChip. Follow existing color palette (team primary/secondary from teams.js). Storybook optional.
deferred_reason: Sprint 5 close-out: React design system requires deep sustained effort. TKT-210 (project setup) is DONE, providing the foundation. Design system is the natural Sprint 6 lead-off ticket — first thing KDB picks up.

2026-02-28T00:00:00Z.detail: Deferred to Sprint 6. Dependency TKT-210 is DONE. This unblocks TKT-213 and TKT-214 once completed. Sprint 6 P0 for KDB.
